description: Well maintained corner  townhome having 3 bedrooms plus 3 washrooms situated  at Polygon's Bristol Heights boasts an open concept layout highlighted by a main floor with 9' ceiling, laminate wood flooring, and a deck. A gourmet kitchen is accented by custom-designed cabinetry, sleek stainless steel appliances, engineered stone countertops, full-height tile backsplash, and a large island where the whole family can gather. The master ensuite  upstairs features double sinks and a spa shower with bench. Downstairs, enjoy your double/tandem car garage and convenient storage. Close to all levels of schools plus shopping & food junctions plaza. Do not miss chance to occupy this beauty before it has gone!
